name: Optimizing sugaar HTTP and network stack

description: Baseline: HTTP/network stack benchmarks with quiet logging

asi.hypothesis: Baseline measurement of current HTTP/network stack performance
asi.setup: Custom quiet benchmarks to eliminate log noise

description: Pre-compute middleware chain in App to eliminate per-request closure allocations

asi.hypothesis: Pre-computing the middleware chain eliminates len(mws) closure allocations per request
asi.impact: route_allocs reduced by 10 (22%), route_ns reduced by 27ns (2.6%)
asi.next: Continue with context.WithValue + Request.WithContext allocation elimination

description: Reuse statusWriter via Context field and use json.Marshal instead of json.NewEncoder

asi.hypothesis: Reusing statusWriter eliminates 1 alloc per request; json.Marshal avoids encoder alloc
asi.next: Eliminate context.WithValue + Request.WithContext allocations via ctxWriter approach

description: Store request ID directly in Context field and use unsafe.String for hex encoding to eliminate map allocation

asi.hypothesis: Eliminating Context.Set map allocation for request ID and using stack-allocated hex encoding reduces allocs
asi.next: Optimize Hub.Publish subscriber slice pooling or reduce log.Warn allocations
